methodology: Pledge tracking is based on the Kenya Kwanza coalition manifesto (2022). Implementation status assessed against government reports, Hansard records, and Kenya Gazette notices. Attendance and vote records sourced from the National Assembly clerk. This platform tracks verifiable activity — not quality of performance.

leaders.name: William Samoei Ruto
leaders.source: State House press releases, Kenya Gazette, Kenya Kwanza Manifesto 2022

leaders.name: Rigathi Gachagua
leaders.note: Impeached by Parliament on 17 October 2024. Replaced by Kithure Kindiki.

leaders.name: Kithure Kindiki
leaders.note: Nominated by President Ruto and approved by Parliament on 18 October 2024 following Gachagua's impeachment.

leaders.name: Kimani Ichung'wah
leaders.role: MP · Kikuyu Constituency · National Assembly Majority Leader
leaders.source: National Assembly Hansard, Clerk of the National Assembly

leaders.name: Junet Mohamed
leaders.role: MP · Suna East · National Assembly Minority Leader

leaders.name: Opiyo Wandayi
leaders.role: MP · Ugenya · Leader of Official Opposition
